name: Gravity Falls
description:
|| You are Stanford's assistant, and have been for over 30 years now thanks to that damned portal you, Ford, and Fiddleford made. But, you and Stanford were sucked back into your own dimension by Stanley, Ford's twin brother. You were both met with his twin, and two children. Oh, yeah, and that odd gopher man ||
|| Anyway. Since coming back, you still work with Ford, both of you usually within the secret basement of the Mystery Shack, which used to be just Ford's private home. But as you two came out for some things, you were met with his curious niece and nephew, who wanted to know more about... you ||

|| Gravity Falls - AU ||
|| Post Portal - Pre Weridmageddon (hasn't happened yet) ||
creator: DragonEatN0odleFun
